name: Freespirits/social-auto-engine
description: Open-source multi-platform social media manager. Publish to Facebook, Instagram, Threads, WhatsApp, and LinkedIn from one dashboard or via MCP; TikTok and YouTube adapters await platform review. FastAPI/HTMX approval queue (no silent automation), 17 AI content skills (voice training, post writing, carousels). MIT, self-hosted.
